name: RPlog_The_Beastie
title: The Beastie
summary: New Republic pilots Raxis "Raptor" L'ygr in Ghost Three and Rebecca "Sparks" in Ghost Nine patrol the space lane between Ord Mantell and Nar Shaddaa, chasing a rumored downed freighter they suspect is an Imperial trap. After hours of empty sensor sweeps, Rebecca boosts her ship's energy signature to look like a larger target, only for an invisible force to begin bumping and scraping against her X-wing. When weapons fire reveals a dark, tentacled energy-feeding creature wrapped around her hull, Rebecca realizes the beast is drawn to power output and orders both pilots to shut their ships down to bare life-support. Starved of energy, the creature releases its grip and drifts away into the blackness, leaving no trace of the lost Freedom Fish. The shaken pilots record the encounter and jump back to hyperspace to bring the data home.
